evidence_quotes.quote: video game publishers destroying video games.

paragraphs.text: Hello, I have been a fervent supported of the "Stop Killing Games" initiative and feel that this Digital Fairness act could be the perfect place to include legislation regarding having customers be protected from video game publishers destroying video games. I realize this point may have already come across in feedback, but I do want to underline that this would really help protect us fans of video games from potentially losing access to media that we purchased rightfully. It is really a bad standard set by the industry and the EU has the chance to make things right :) This is linked to the following EU citizens initiative, where you can find more details: https://eci.ec.europa.eu/045/public/#/screen/home Thank you, Paul
